response.justification: While Bogdan meets the educational baseline with a BS in Computer Science from ETH Zürich and 14+ years of experience, he lacks the critical domain expertise this Principal-level role demands. The position requires deep knowledge of SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, and AI accelerator hardware optimization—areas entirely absent from his resume, which focuses on web services, mobile applications, and general software infrastructure. His recent AI-agent infrastructure work is at the application level, not the hardware-software co-design level required.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with proven TDD discipline, testing expertise, and clean code practices across multiple projects
Performance optimization experience including low-latency systems at scale and architectural thinking across diverse technical domains
Meets educational requirement with BS in Computer Science from top-tier institution plus 14+ years of technical experience
concerns: No GPU, TPU, or AI accelerator architecture experience—critical for a role focused on cloud infrastructure and hardware optimization for AI accelerators
Lacks SoC (System-on-Chip) and IP (intellectual property core) modeling experience, which is explicitly required as a core skill
No demonstrated background in deep learning workload optimization or hardware-software co-design at the level expected of a Principal architect
